name: LinkedIn Feed
description: Persistent LinkedIn feed simulation. Supports advanced feed reading, comment expansion, profile peeks, notifications checks, and avatar clicks.

name: Blue Team Gauntlet (full suite)
description: LinkedIn-proportioned Blue Team field. Runs the full Red suite multi-minute: Markov-continuity feed scan, interest-driven search/profile reads, notifications, and surfaces the Blue evasion verdict + journey score.

name: The Last Human Line Sandbox
description: Adversarial Blue Team Anti-Bot Evaluation Sandbox. Tests browser environment integrity (Layer 2) and biometric kinetics (Layer 3).

name: Wikipedia AI
description: Public Wikipedia article on AI. Great for testing multi-page link clicks and reading pauses.

name: Wikipedia Machine Learning
description: Wikipedia article on ML. Perfect for testing search-like queries and scroll-and-read behaviors.

name: Yahoo News
description: Dynamic news portal. Good for testing feed scans, comments, and fast-paced browsing.

name: Hacker News
description: Text-heavy tech feed. Ideal for testing precise, low-touch link clicks and methodic scanner pacing.
